name: Tapfiliate Affiliate Tracking API
what_it_does: Tapfiliate affiliate tracking REST API for SaaS, e-commerce, and subscription businesses to create and manage affiliate programs with customizable commission structures, affiliate portals, and multi-channel tracking. Enables AI agents to manage affiliate account creation and onboarding for affiliate program automation, handle conversion and click tracking for performance attribution automation, access commission tier and structure configuration for compensation model automation, retrieve affiliate payout and balance management for payment processing automation, manage coupon code assignment and tracking for promotional campaign automation, handle affiliate asset and creative management for content distribution automation, access referral program performance analytics for optimization automation, retrieve affiliate approval and application review for publisher quality automation, manage recurring commission for subscription-based affiliate automation, and integrate Tapfiliate with Shopify, Stripe, WooCommerce, and payment platforms for end-to-end affiliate program automation.
use_cases: Running SaaS affiliate programs from program management agents
Tracking referral conversions from attribution automation agents
Managing commission payouts from affiliate payment agents
Recruiting and approving affiliates from publisher network agents
not_for: Large publisher network access (use ShareASale or CJ Affiliate for established networks)
Influencer campaign management (use Grin or AspireIQ)
Complex enterprise multi-tier affiliate programs (use Impact.com)
best_when: A SaaS or e-commerce company wanting AI agents to automate affiliate program tracking, commission management, coupon distribution, and payout processing through Tapfiliate's developer-friendly self-hosted affiliate platform.
avoid_when: RECURRING COMMISSION SETUP REQUIRES SUBSCRIPTION INTEGRATION: Tapfiliate recurring commissions for SaaS depend on subscription payment event webhooks from Stripe or Chargebee; automated recurring commission requires active payment provider webhook integration; automated recurring commission setup without payment provider connection creates one-time commission instead of recurring. AFFILIATE PORTAL WHITE-LABELING REQUIRES CUSTOM DOMAIN SETUP: Tapfiliate affiliate portal white-labeling requires custom domain DNS configuration; automated affiliate program launch with branded portal requires DNS propagation time (24-48 hours); automated same-day branded portal launch without DNS setup creates generic Tapfiliate-branded portal. COMMISSION CURRENCY CONVERSION FOR MULTI-CURRENCY PROGRAMS: Tapfiliate handles single-currency commission by default; automated multi-currency e-commerce programs must handle currency conversion before passing conversion value to Tapfiliate; automated commission tracking using foreign currency amounts without conversion creates inaccurate commission calculations.

auth.notes: Tapfiliate uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Amsterdam, Netherlands HQ. Founded 2014. Bootstrapped/profitable. Products: Affiliate tracking, commission management, affiliate portal, coupon tracking, recurring commissions. Integrations: Shopify, Stripe, WooCommerce, Chargebee, PayPal. GDPR. Serves 2,000+ businesses. Competes with Rewardful, Refersion, and PartnerStack for SaaS/e-commerce affiliate programs.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential ($89/mo), Pro ($149/mo), Enterprise (custom); annual discount available
pricing.notes: Amsterdam NL. Bootstrapped. Monthly subscription. 14-day trial. Annual discount available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; conversion and affiliate queries throttled; webhooks for conversion, click, and payout events

known_agent_gotchas: CONVERSION EXTERNAL ID FOR DEDUPLICATION: Tapfiliate conversion tracking accepts external_id parameter for deduplication; automated conversion tracking must pass unique order or transaction ID as external_id; automated conversion without external_id creates duplicate conversions for retried payment webhooks

AFFILIATE ASSET UPLOAD SIZE LIMITS: Tapfiliate creative asset uploads (banners, logos) have size and format limits; automated creative asset management must validate file size and format before upload; automated bulk asset upload without validation creates failed uploads for oversized or unsupported format files

COMMISSION TIER HIERARCHY FOR AUTOMATED CALCULATION: Tapfiliate supports tiered commission structures with performance thresholds; automated commission calculation must retrieve current tier for each affiliate; automated flat-rate commission assumption without tier lookup creates underpayment for high-performing affiliates

COUPON CODE EXCLUSIVITY ENFORCEMENT: Tapfiliate coupon codes can be assigned exclusively to single affiliates; automated coupon distribution must check exclusivity before assignment; automated coupon sharing without exclusivity check creates attribution conflict for shared coupon conversions

WEBHOOK RETRY vs CONVERSION DUPLICATE: Tapfiliate may retry failed webhooks for conversion events; automated conversion processing must implement idempotency using external_id; automated processing without idempotency creates duplicate commission entries from webhook retries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Affiliate tracking. GDPR. API key. EU. Affiliate, conversion, and commission data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Affiliate tracking. GDPR. API key. EU. Conversion and commission data.
